mapper.sql: SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PWD, NAME, ROLE, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTH, ADDRESS, SEARCH_ME, GENDER, MINIMI, CREATE_DATE, ACORN, STATUS FROM MEMBER
SELECT REQ_NO, REQ_SENDER_NO, REQ_RECEIVER_NO, REQ_ILCHON_NICK, REQ_TITLE, REQ_CONTENT, REQ_DATE, REQ_STATUS FROM REQUEST
SELECT ILCHON_IDX, USER_NO, ILCHON_NO, ILCHON_NICK, ILCHON_CATE, ILCHON_STATUS FROM ILCHON

SELECT i.ILCHON_IDX, m.USER_NO, i.ILCHON_NO, i.ILCHON_NICK, i.ILCHON_CATE, i.ILCHON_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM ILCHON i JOIN MEMBER m ON i.ILCHON_NO = m.USER_NO

SELECT r.REQ_NO, r.REQ_SENDER_NO, r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO, r.REQ_ILCHON_NICK, r.REQ_TITLE, r.REQ_CONTENT, r.REQ_DATE, r.REQ_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM REQUEST r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.REQ_SENDER_NO = m.USER_NO
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, NAME, MINIMI FROM MEMBER WHERE SEARCH_ME = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER
WHERE USER_NO = #{no}

SELECT r.REQ_NO, r.REQ_SENDER_NO, r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO, r.REQ_ILCHON_NICK, r.REQ_TITLE, r.REQ_CONTENT, r.REQ_DATE, r.REQ_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM REQUEST r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.REQ_SENDER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE REQ_NO = #{no}

SELECT r.REQ_NO, r.REQ_SENDER_NO, r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO, r.REQ_ILCHON_NICK, r.REQ_TITLE, r.REQ_CONTENT, r.REQ_DATE, r.REQ_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM REQUEST r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE REQ_NO = #{no}
WHERE REQ_SENDER_NO = #{sender} and REQ_RECEIVER_NO = #{receiver}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REQUEST ( REQ_NO, REQ_SENDER_NO, REQ_RECEIVER_NO, REQ_ILCHON_NICK, REQ_TITLE, REQ_CONTENT, REQ_DATE, REQ_STATUS ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('SEQ_REQUEST') FROM DUAL), #{sender},#{receiver},#{ilchonNick},#{requestTitle},#{requestContent},DEFAULT,DEFAULT)
mapper.select: WHERE i.USER_NO = #{no} AND i.ILCHON_STATUS='Y'
WHERE USER_NO = #{no}
WHERE REQ_SENDER_NO = #{no}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ILCHON WHERE ILCHON_STATUS='Y' AND USER_NO = #{no}

SELECT r.REQ_NO, r.REQ_SENDER_NO, r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO, r.REQ_ILCHON_NICK, r.REQ_TITLE, r.REQ_CONTENT, r.REQ_DATE, r.REQ_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM REQUEST r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE REQ_SENDER_NO = #{no}

SELECT r.REQ_NO, r.REQ_SENDER_NO, r.REQ_RECEIVER_NO, r.REQ_ILCHON_NICK, r.REQ_TITLE, r.REQ_CONTENT, r.REQ_DATE, r.REQ_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM REQUEST r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.REQ_SENDER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE REQ_RECEIVER_NO = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ILCHON ( ILCHON_IDX, USER_NO, ILCHON_NO, ILCHON_NICK, ILCHON_CATE, ILCHON_STATUS ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('SEQ_ILCHON') FROM DUAL), #{userNo},#{ilchonNo},#{ilchonNick},DEFAULT,DEFAULT)
mapper.select: WHERE REQ_RECEIVER_NO = #{no} AND REQ_NO = #{requestNo}
WHERE REQ_SENDER_NO = #{no} AND REQ_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT m.NAME, m.USER_ID, i.ILCHON_NICK FROM MEMBER m JOIN ILCHON i ON m.USER_NO = i.ILCHON_NO WHERE i.ILCHON_STATUS = 'Y'and i.USER_NO = #{no}
AND m.USER_ID LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%' )
AND m.NAME LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%' )
AND i.ILCHON_NICK LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%' )
ORDER BY i.ILCHON_NICK DESC

SELECT NAME, USER_ID FROM MEMBER WHERE
USER_ID LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%' )
NAME LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%' )
mapper.update: UPDATE REQUEST SET REQ_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE REQ_NO = #{requestNo}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO FROM MINIHOME WHERE MINIHOME_NO = #{minihomeNo}

SELECT i.ILCHON_IDX, m.USER_NO, i.ILCHON_NO, i.ILCHON_NICK, i.ILCHON_CATE, i.ILCHON_STATUS, m.USER_ID, m.USER_PWD, m.NAME, m.ROLE, m.PHONE, m.EMAIL, m.BIRTH, m.ADDRESS, m.SEARCH_ME, m.GENDER, m.MINIMI, m.CREATE_DATE, m.ACORN, m.STATUS FROM ILCHON i JOIN MEMBER m ON i.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND i.ILCHON_NO = #{no}
